questions.question: Which of the following details accurately describes the metahuman capabilities and technical background of Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing) — perceives EM emissions from 30 Hz to 6 GHz within 80 m; designed the Reset Bracers

choices.label: B
choices.text: Class B-2 (Thermal Imaging) — perceives thermal signatures from -50°C to 150°C within 150 m; designed the Calexin-7 delivery system

choices.label: C
choices.text: Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing) — perceives EM emissions from 100 Hz to 10 GHz within 50 m; designed the CBMP containment grid

choices.label: D
choices.text: Class A-2 (Signal Interception) — intercepts radio frequencies from 1 MHz to 10 GHz within 120 m; designed the Andean Bureau telemetry array

questions.explanation: According to the dossier, Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez is classified as Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing), perceives EM emissions from 30 Hz to 6 GHz within 80 m, and designed the Reset Bracers (§4.6).

questions.question: Which Cell Halcón member is a civilian who served 14 years in the Bolivian Special Forces (Regimiento Bolívar) and specializes in high-altitude tracking and alpine reconnaissance?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Cpl. Raúl Vendrame

choices.label: B
choices.text: Sgt. Mateo Quispe-Linares

choices.label: C
choices.text: Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez

choices.label: D
choices.text: Comandante Ezequiel Ovalle-Garrido

questions.explanation: Sgt. Mateo Quispe-Linares is a civilian tracker with prior service of 14 years in the Bolivian Special Forces, Regimiento Bolívar, specializing in high-altitude tracking and alpine reconnaissance.

questions.question: What is the primary operational medical responsibility of civilian field medic Cpl. Raúl Vendrame within Cell Halcón?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Performing advanced neurosurgery in field conditions

choices.label: B
choices.text: Administering the asset's Calexin-7 regimen during operations

choices.label: C
choices.text: Monitoring the electromagnetic exposure limits of the team

choices.label: D
choices.text: Managing the psychological evaluations of metahuman operatives

questions.explanation: The dossier states that Cpl. Raúl Vendrame is the primary administrator of the asset's Calexin-7 regimen during operations.

questions.question: Which senior PAMC ally is the asset's direct chain-of-command superior and is authorized to override all engagement decisions except Director-General-level orders?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Dr. Léon Marrón-Saavedra

choices.label: B
choices.text: Director-General María-Elena Espósito-Tagle

choices.label: C
choices.text: Director Aída Salvatierra-Bunge

choices.label: D
choices.text: Inspector General Magnus Sletten

questions.explanation: Director Aída Salvatierra-Bunge is the Operations Directorate Director and the asset's direct chain-of-command superior, authorized to override all engagement decisions except Director-General-level orders.

questions.question: What is the civilian occupation and PAMC clearance status of Dr. Catalina Renström-Verdugo, the asset's spouse?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Pediatric oncologist at Clínica Las Condes; PAMC Civilian Liaison Clearance Level 3

choices.label: B
choices.text: Senior psychologist at PAMC Behavioral Health; PAMC Security Clearance Level 4

choices.label: C
choices.text: Clinical research director at ETH Zürich; PAMC Technical Clearance Level 2

choices.label: D
choices.text: Civilian intelligence asset in La Paz; PAMC Discretionary Clearance Level 1

questions.explanation: Dr. Catalina Renström-Verdugo is a pediatric oncologist at Clínica Las Condes, Santiago, and holds a PAMC Civilian Liaison Clearance Level 3 granted in January 2024.

questions.question: Which restricted zone within the asset's operational territory is completely forbidden for PAMC operations due to jurisdictional reasons pending a bilateral agreement?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Salar de Uyuni Sector 4 (Bolivia)

choices.label: B
choices.text: Easter Island

choices.label: C
choices.text: Cerro Castillo exclusion ring

choices.label: D
choices.text: Trelew Industrial Park 7

questions.explanation: According to Section 8.6, Easter Island is restricted due to 'Jurisdictional; pending bilateral agreement' reasons, and its status is 'No PAMC operations authorized'.

questions.question: According to the standardized provisioning standard, which individual is responsible for auditing the asset's safehouses semi-annually?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Hermana Mendieta

choices.label: B
choices.text: The Director-General

choices.label: C
choices.text: Cpl. Vendrame

choices.label: D
choices.text: Operative MIRADOR

questions.explanation: Section 8.3 states that 'Safehouse provisioning is audited semi-annually by Cpl. Vendrame on behalf of the cell.'

questions.question: What is the designated function of the secondary base located at Annex Industrial Park 7, Trelew, Argentina?

choices.label: A
choices.text: A field office for Bolivian altiplano operations

choices.label: B
choices.text: PAMC Headquarters for quarterly senior briefings

choices.label: C
choices.text: A logistics-only annex for southern operations

choices.label: D
choices.text: A regional CBMP medical office and micro-lab

questions.explanation: Section 8.2 lists the function of the Trelew, Argentina location (Annex Industrial Park 7) as 'Logistics-only annex, southern operations'.

questions.question: What are the minimum node redundancy requirements for cell-led operations within the PAMC Yatiri network?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Line-of-comms to at least 2 nodes

choices.label: B
choices.text: Line-of-comms to at least 1 primary node and 2 backup satellite uplinks

choices.label: C
choices.text: Direct connection to all 8 burst-relay nodes

choices.label: D
choices.text: Line-of-comms to at least 4 nodes

questions.explanation: Section 8.7 states that node redundancy requires 'each cell-led operation requires line-of-comms to at least 2 nodes.'

questions.question: Why is the asset restricted from entering the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring (1.6 km radius)?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Due to ongoing classified PAMC investigations since 2023

choices.label: B
choices.text: Due to psychological reasons and a CBMP recommendation

choices.label: C
choices.text: Due to jurisdictional disputes and pending bilateral agreements

choices.label: D
choices.text: Due to a lack of Yatiri-2 communications network coverage

questions.explanation: Section 8.6 specifies that the reason for the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring restriction is 'Psychological; CBMP recommendation since 2020'.

questions.question: During Case 2025-0156 (Cabrestante Neutralization), how was 'segmented suspension' applied as a tactical workaround for above-ceiling targets?

choices.label: A
choices.text: By suspending the hydraulic arm at the elbow joint rather than the full augment

choices.label: B
choices.text: By increasing the asset's mass-ceiling stability to 300 kg using Calexin-7

choices.label: C
choices.text: By synchronizing the suspension field with an Echo Lock event

choices.label: D
choices.text: By coordinating the deployment of high-lux kits across three active cells

questions.explanation: According to Section 9.9, the Cabrestante Neutralization involved a 'coordinated cell engagement utilizing segmented suspension (suspending the hydraulic arm at the elbow joint rather than the full augment)' which served as a tactical workaround for above-ceiling targets.

questions.question: In the rare extra-territorial joint operation detailed in Case 2024-0156 (Tallinn-Asunción Liaison), which EUMR operatives did the asset coordinate with?

choices.label: A
choices.text: HOLLOWMARK and VERIDIAN

choices.label: B
choices.text: Cataract and Cabrestante

choices.label: C
choices.text: Sgt. Quispe-Linares and Lt. Bauer-Cortez

choices.label: D
choices.text: Cpl. Adolfo Yáñez-Ríos and Director-General Espósito-Tagle

questions.explanation: Section 9.9.6 states that Case 2024-0156 was a joint operation with EUMR operatives HOLLOWMARK and VERIDIAN, during which the asset spent 9 days in Tallinn coordinating intelligence handoff.

questions.question: Which formal doctrine was articulated as a direct result of the pyrrhic outcome in Case 2022-0123 (Tropopausa First Engagement) in Mendoza?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Doctrine of Sequential Suspension

choices.label: B
choices.text: Doctrine of Segmented Suspension

choices.label: C
choices.text: Doctrine of Nocturnal Engagement

choices.label: D
choices.text: Doctrine of Extra-Territorial Interdiction

questions.explanation: Section 9.4 notes that the Mendoza engagement (Case 2022-0123) 'triggered formal articulation of the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension' after an operative was KIA and the target escaped.

questions.question: Why is Case 2024-0202 (Quebrantadero Showdown) classified as 'Catastrophic' and studied at the Lima Academy as the asset's most prominent operational failure?

choices.label: A
choices.text: An Echo Lock pulse struck a civilian-density urban target, causing 11 civilian deaths and 27 injuries

choices.label: B
choices.text: The entire tactical cell was captured, resulting in a loss of USD $4.2 million in assets

choices.label: C
choices.text: The asset suffered permanent ear barotrauma, ending active field deployments

choices.label: D
choices.text: The Concession successfully compromised the PAMC HQ internal database in Lima

questions.explanation: Section 9.7 states that Case 2024-0202 had a 'Catastrophic' outcome because Quebrantadero's pulse struck a civilian-density urban target before SLATEFALL could interdict, resulting in 11 civilian deaths and 27 civilian injuries.

questions.question: In Case 2021-0091 (Atacama Altiplano), which of the asset's abilities was operationally validated and added to the capability registry after interdicting three incoming small-arms rounds?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Drift Read

choices.label: B
choices.text: Suspended Field

choices.label: C
choices.text: Inertial Suspension

choices.label: D
choices.text: Segmented Suspension

questions.explanation: Section 9.9.5 states that Case 2021-0091 was the 'First operationally validated deployment of the newly emerged Drift Read ability,' which was subsequently added to the capability registry on 30 September 2021.
